members.name: AddTransition
members.signature: public void AddTransition(int fromClip, int toClip, int fromTime, int toTime, int fadeMode, float fadeBeats, bool useFillerClip, int fillerClip, bool holdPrevious)
members.summary: Add a transition between two clips. Provide the indices of the source and destination clips, or use the [constant CLIP_ANY] constant to indicate that transition happens to/from any clip to this one. * [param from_time] indicates the moment in the current clip the transition will begin after triggered. * [param to_time] indicates the time in the next clip that the playback will start from. * [param fade_mode] indicates how the fade will happen between clips. If unsure, just use [constant FADE_AUTOMATIC] which uses the most common type of fade for each situation. * [param fade_beats] indicates how many beats the fade will take. Using decimals is allowed. * [param use_filler_clip] indicates that there will be a filler clip used between the source and destination clips. * [param filler_clip] the index of the filler clip. * If [param hold_previous] is used, then this clip will be remembered. This can be used together with [constant AUTO_ADVANCE_RETURN_TO_HOLD] to return to this clip after another is done playing.

members.name: EraseTransition
members.signature: public void EraseTransition(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Erase a transition by providing [param from_clip] and [param to_clip] clip indices. [constant CLIP_ANY] can be used for either argument or both.

members.name: GetClipAutoAdvance
members.signature: public int GetClipAutoAdvance(int clipIndex)
members.summary: Return whether a clip has auto-advance enabled. See [method set_clip_auto_advance].

members.name: GetClipAutoAdvanceNextClip
members.signature: public int GetClipAutoAdvanceNextClip(int clipIndex)
members.summary: Return the clip towards which the clip referenced by [param clip_index] will auto-advance to.

members.name: GetClipName
members.signature: public StringName GetClipName(int clipIndex)
members.summary: Return the name of a clip.

members.name: GetClipStream
members.signature: public AudioStream GetClipStream(int clipIndex)
members.summary: Return the [AudioStream] associated with a clip.

members.name: GetTransitionFadeBeats
members.signature: public float GetTransitionFadeBeats(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Return the time (in beats) for a transition (see [method add_transition]).

members.name: GetTransitionFadeMode
members.signature: public int GetTransitionFadeMode(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Return the mode for a transition (see [method add_transition]).

members.name: GetTransitionFillerClip
members.signature: public int GetTransitionFillerClip(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Return the filler clip for a transition (see [method add_transition]).

members.name: GetTransitionFromTime
members.signature: public int GetTransitionFromTime(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Return the source time position for a transition (see [method add_transition]).

members.name: GetTransitionList
members.signature: public PackedInt32Array GetTransitionList()
members.summary: Return the list of transitions (from, to interleaved).

members.name: GetTransitionToTime
members.signature: public int GetTransitionToTime(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Return the destination time position for a transition (see [method add_transition]).

members.name: HasTransition
members.signature: public bool HasTransition(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a given transition exists (was added via [method add_transition]).

members.name: IsTransitionHoldingPrevious
members.signature: public bool IsTransitionHoldingPrevious(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Return whether a transition uses the [i]hold previous[/i] functionality (see [method add_transition]).

members.name: IsTransitionUsingFillerClip
members.signature: public bool IsTransitionUsingFillerClip(int fromClip, int toClip)
members.summary: Return whether a transition uses the [i]filler clip[/i] functionality (see [method add_transition]).

members.name: SetClipAutoAdvance
members.signature: public void SetClipAutoAdvance(int clipIndex, int mode)
members.summary: Set whether a clip will auto-advance by changing the auto-advance mode.

members.name: SetClipAutoAdvanceNextClip
members.signature: public void SetClipAutoAdvanceNextClip(int clipIndex, int autoAdvanceNextClip)
members.summary: Set the index of the next clip towards which this clip will auto advance to when finished. If the clip being played loops, then auto-advance will be ignored.

members.name: SetClipName
members.signature: public void SetClipName(int clipIndex, StringName name)
members.summary: Set the name of the current clip (for easier identification).

members.name: SetClipStream
members.signature: public void SetClipStream(int clipIndex, AudioStream stream)
members.summary: Set the [AudioStream] associated with the current clip.

members.name: ClipCount
members.signature: public int ClipCount { get; set; }
members.summary: Amount of clips contained in this interactive player.

members.name: InitialClip
members.signature: public int InitialClip { get; set; }
members.summary: Index of the initial clip, which will be played first when this stream is played.

values.name: AUTO_ADVANCE_ENABLED
values.summary: Enable auto-advance, a clip must be specified.

values.name: AUTO_ADVANCE_RETURN_TO_HOLD
values.summary: Enable auto-advance, but instead of specifying a clip, the playback will return to hold (see [method add_transition]).

values.name: FADE_AUTOMATIC
values.summary: Use automatic fade logic depending on the transition from/to. It is recommended to use this by default.

values.name: FADE_DISABLED
values.summary: Do not use fade for the transition. This is useful when transitioning from a clip-end to clip-beginning, and each clip has their begin/end.

values.name: FADE_IN
values.summary: Use a fade-in in the next clip, let the current clip finish.

values.name: FADE_OUT
values.summary: Use a fade-out in the current clip, the next clip will start by itself.

values.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_END
values.summary: Transition when the current clip finished playing.

values.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_IMMEDIATE
values.summary: Start transition as soon as possible, don't wait for any specific time position.

values.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_NEXT_BAR
values.summary: Transition when the clip playback position reaches the next bar.

values.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_NEXT_BEAT
values.summary: Transition when the clip playback position reaches the next beat.

values.name: TRANSITION_TO_TIME_PREVIOUS_POSITION
values.summary: Transition to the last played position in the destination clip, if there was a previous transition from that clip. Otherwise, plays from the start of the destination clip.

values.name: TRANSITION_TO_TIME_SAME_POSITION
values.summary: Transition to the same position in the destination clip. This is useful when both clips have exactly the same length and the music should fade between them.

values.name: TRANSITION_TO_TIME_START
values.summary: Transition to the start of the destination clip.

constants.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_IMMEDIATE
constants.summary: Start transition as soon as possible, don't wait for any specific time position.

constants.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_NEXT_BEAT
constants.summary: Transition when the clip playback position reaches the next beat.

constants.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_NEXT_BAR
constants.summary: Transition when the clip playback position reaches the next bar.

constants.name: TRANSITION_FROM_TIME_END
constants.summary: Transition when the current clip finished playing.

constants.name: TRANSITION_TO_TIME_SAME_POSITION
constants.summary: Transition to the same position in the destination clip. This is useful when both clips have exactly the same length and the music should fade between them.

constants.name: TRANSITION_TO_TIME_START
constants.summary: Transition to the start of the destination clip.

constants.name: TRANSITION_TO_TIME_PREVIOUS_POSITION
constants.summary: Transition to the last played position in the destination clip, if there was a previous transition from that clip. Otherwise, plays from the start of the destination clip.

constants.name: FADE_DISABLED
constants.summary: Do not use fade for the transition. This is useful when transitioning from a clip-end to clip-beginning, and each clip has their begin/end.

constants.name: FADE_IN
constants.summary: Use a fade-in in the next clip, let the current clip finish.

constants.name: FADE_OUT
constants.summary: Use a fade-out in the current clip, the next clip will start by itself.

constants.name: FADE_AUTOMATIC
constants.summary: Use automatic fade logic depending on the transition from/to. It is recommended to use this by default.

constants.name: AUTO_ADVANCE_ENABLED
constants.summary: Enable auto-advance, a clip must be specified.

constants.name: AUTO_ADVANCE_RETURN_TO_HOLD
constants.summary: Enable auto-advance, but instead of specifying a clip, the playback will return to hold (see [method add_transition]).

constants.name: CLIP_ANY
constants.summary: This constant describes that any clip is valid for a specific transition as either source or destination.
